column1: 3D CONFIGURATOR - Customer Data Template
HOW TO USE THIS FILE:
1. Fill in the 'Parts' sheet with all your configurable components
2. Fill in the 'Rules' sheet with compatibility rules (optional)
3. Fill in the 'Presets' sheet with pre-built configurations (optional)
4. Fill in the 'Categories' sheet to define how options are grouped
GLB FILE REQUIREMENTS:
• Create ONE .glb file per category (e.g., seats.glb, wheels.glb)
• Each GLB contains ALL variants for that category
• Node names inside GLB must match the 'Node_Name' column exactly
• Keep base/frame in a separate 'base.glb' file (always loaded first)
PERFORMANCE TIPS:
• Keep individual GLB files under 10MB for best mobile performance
• Use Draco compression on all GLB files
• Limit textures to 2K resolution maximum
COLUMN LEGEND:
• Yellow = Instructions/Notes
• Green = Example data (replace with your data)
• Orange = Required field
NEED HELP?
Contact your implementation team for GLB preparation assistance.
